final:
module top_module(
    input logic [31:0] a,
    input logic [31:0] b,
    output logic [31:0] y
);always_comb begin
        y = a | b;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y[0] <= ~a[0];
      for (int i = 1; i < 32; i++) begin
        y[i] <= ~a[i] & ~b[i];
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
